title: FALCON Enamel Bake Pan Blue & White Large 37 X 29.5 6cm Roasting Baking Tray (61037)
features: For baking and roasting. perfect for your vegetables Resistant to scratches and cutting marks Completely oven safe up to 250 Deg C Promotes good and even browning Hygienic and easy to clean Dishwasher proof White Size: 37x29.5cm Barcode:5012823030084
description: The perfect bake pan to bake and serve delicious portions of tasty food. Crafted from heavy gauge steel in deep oblong shape with high-quality white porcelain fused enamel coating and blue rim, is this enamel pan so you can bake endless number of different foods. Dimensions Falcon Housewares Oblong Enamel Bake Pan is – L: 37cm x W: 29.5cm. This enamel oblong pie dish is Oven Safe Up To 270°C/530°F, Dishwasher Safe & Freezer Safe. It is also suitable to use on Gas & Electric Hobs. OVEN TO TABLEWARE BAKE PAN – Due to the white enamel finish, this bake pan is handy for both baking and serving purposes. Due to the 37cm length rectangular structure you can directly bake and serve sharing portions of delicious food. The deep structure will let you place in a suitable amount of filling and the flat wide edge will let you bake a crusty rim if you’re making a pie. A white finish makes it perfect to combine with other tableware! HIGH-QUALITY ENAMELWARE – This enamel oblong bake pan is crafted with a high-quality enamel coating for enduring strength. The thick enamel is porcelain fused onto the heavy gauge steel bake pan, to give many admirable qualities such as durability, smoothness and chemical resistance. The bake pan will remain resistant to stains and scratches. It may sound heavy but is light as any tin bake pan! VERSATILE FOOD BAKING PAN – Due to the wide surface are, it is the perfect baking pan to bake or roast large quantities various different types of food such as pies, vegetables, lasagne or even a whole turkey. As the pan is Freezer Safe, you can cover up and keep leftovers within the pan, without having to empty it out. Falcon White Enamel Bakepan 37x29cm For baking and roasting. perfect for your vegetables Resistant to scratches and cutting marks Completely oven safe up to 250 Deg C Promotes good and even browning Hygienic and easy to clean Dishwasher proof White Size: 37x29.5cm Barcode:5012823030084
